# TySug

> github.com/Dynom/TySug/cmd/web

## Go API

- [cmd/web](/docs/reference/pkg-cmd-web.html): github.com/Dynom/TySug/cmd/web
- [finder](/docs/reference/pkg-finder.html): github.com/Dynom/TySug/finder
- [internal/rwc](/docs/reference/pkg-internal-rwc.html): github.com/Dynom/TySug/internal/rwc
- [keyboard](/docs/reference/pkg-keyboard.html): github.com/Dynom/TySug/keyboard
- [server](/docs/reference/pkg-server.html): github.com/Dynom/TySug/server
- [server/service](/docs/reference/pkg-server-service.html): github.com/Dynom/TySug/server/service
- [Go API](/docs/reference/): github.com/Dynom/TySug
